subject: [PATCH 0/2] mm/huge_memory: drop dead split helper variants

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Acknowledged both patches without raising any concerns.
reviews.raw_body:
On 16/07/2026 11:03, Kiryl Shutsemau wrote:
> From: "Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)" <kas@kernel.org>
> 
> can_split_folio() has no callers and no definition under
> CONFIG_TRANSPARENT_HUGEPAGE; only the !THP stub remains, left behind by an
> earlier cleanup.  Remove it.
> 
> No functional change.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta) <kas@kernel.org>
> ---
>  include/linux/huge_mm.h | 5 -----
>  1 file changed, 5 deletions(-)
> 
Acked-by: Usama Arif <usama.arif@linux.dev>

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch series without raising any concerns.

reviews.author: Lorenzo Stoakes
reviews.summary: LGTM'd both patches and provided Reviewed-by tags.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: LGTM'd both patches and provided Reviewed-by tags.
reviews.raw_body:
On Thu Jul 16, 2026 at 6:03 AM EDT, Kiryl Shutsemau wrote:
> From: "Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)" <kas@kernel.org>
>
> can_split_folio() has no callers and no definition under
> CONFIG_TRANSPARENT_HUGEPAGE; only the !THP stub remains, left behind by an
> earlier cleanup.  Remove it.
>
> No functional change.
>
> Signed-off-by: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta) <kas@kernel.org>
> ---
>  include/linux/huge_mm.h | 5 -----
>  1 file changed, 5 deletions(-)

Thanks.

Reviewed-by: Zi Yan <ziy@nvidia.com>


-- 
Best Regards,
Yan, Zi

2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch series removes two unused functions from the huge_memory module, can_split_folio() and split_folio_to_list_to_order(). The first function is a dead stub that has no callers or definition under CONFIG_TRANSPARENT_HUGEPAGE. The second function has no direct callers and its only user always passes a NULL list, so it's folded into another function.
